title: Aquino Faux Leather Armchair
description: A sculptural armchair with clean lines and supple upholstery — crafted by women artisans for residential lounges and boutique hospitality.

title: Decrescendo Tufted Armchair
description: Tufted accent chair with rhythmic detailing and a generous seat — a quiet statement piece for considered interiors.

title: Bentwood Butterfly Accent Stool
description: Butterfly-profile accent stool in steam-bent timber — versatile as seat or side surface beside a sofa or bed.

title: Monte Carlo Dining Chair
description: Refined dining chair with woven seat and balanced proportions — suited to residential dining and gallery kitchens.

title: Herner Tufted Side Chair
description: Tufted side chair with architectural silhouette — ideal flanking a dining table or as standalone accent seating.

title: Sunbury Beech Foldable Chair — Set of 2
description: Pair of foldable beech dining chairs — practical, warm-toned seating for flexible dining and entertaining.

title: Harlow Handcrafted Stool — Set of 2
description: Set of two artistic handcrafted stools — sculptural forms for dining, entry, or bar-height compositions.

title: Arlene Dining Table
description: Dining table with generous surface and refined base — designed to anchor dining rooms with calm presence.

title: Willa Marble Dining Table
description: Marble-topped dining table with natural veining and substantial base — materiality at the heart of the room.

title: Panama 4-Door Rattan Buffet
description: Four-door rattan buffet with woven panels and warm timber — storage with tactile, tropical character.

title: Panama 2-Door Rattan Buffet
description: Compact two-door rattan buffet for dining and living — ethically made with woven detail and solid joinery.

title: Panama Rattan Entertainment Unit
description: Low entertainment unit in rattan and timber — conceals media while maintaining an editorial, natural aesthetic.

title: Noelle Wood Sideboard
description: Wood sideboard with clean fronts and generous storage — a permanent piece for dining and entry sequences.

title: Alexis Modular Drawer
description: Modular drawer unit for flexible storage — stackable, adaptable, and finished by hand in small-batch production.

title: Hannah 5-Drawer Chest
description: Five-drawer chest with quiet proportions — bedroom storage crafted for longevity and daily ritual.

title: Mandaguari Wardrobe
description: Substantial wardrobe with architectural presence — generous hanging and shelving for residential suites.

title: Tuxedo Tall Cabinet
description: Tall cabinet with vertical emphasis — display and storage for objects, books, and collected pieces.

title: Marrion Display Cabinet
description: Display cabinet for curated objects and ceramics — gallery-like framing for living and retail interiors.

title: Tropical Side Table
description: Side table with tropical material palette — an accent beside seating with warm, tactile surfaces.
